achievements.title: The Charge Booster, Versus the Combo Booster
achievements.description: In Air Ride, win a race of at least 3 laps on Fantasy Meadows using the Rocket Star, handicap of 5 or lower, against one CPU using the Bulk Star, max handicap and CPU level - Damage and Speed Help must be set to "None", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Mach Launcher, Versus the Flight Bouncer
achievements.description: In Air Ride, win a race of at least 3 laps on Celestial Valley using the Jet Star, handicap of 3 or lower, against one CPU using the Winged Star, max handicap and CPU level - Damage and Speed Help must be set to "None", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Ground Brusher, Versus the Tight Turner
achievements.description: In Air Ride, win a race of at least 3 laps on Sky Sands using the Wagon Star, handicap of 4 or lower, against one CPU using the Wheelie Scooter, max handicap and CPU level - Damage and Speed Help must be set to "None", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Gripless Beast, Versus the Tractionless Ribbon
achievements.description: In Air Ride, win a race of at least 3 laps on Frozen Hillside using the Rex Wheelie, handicap of 5 or lower, against one CPU using the Slick Star, max handicap and CPU level - Damage and Speed Help must be set to "None", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Sky Sailer, Versus the Chargeless
achievements.description: In Air Ride, win a race of at least 3 laps on Machine Passage using the Winged Star, handicap of 6 or lower, against one CPU using the Wagon Star, max handicap and CPU level - Damage and Speed Help must be set to "None", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Longtime Partner, Versus the New Time King
achievements.description: In Air Ride, win a race of at least 3 laps on Checker Knights using the Wheelie Bike, handicap of 4 or lower, against one CPU using the Rex Wheelie, max handicap and CPU level - Damage and Speed Help must be set to "None", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Perfect Speed, Versus the Perfect Acceleration

achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Time Attack - Fantasy Meadows - Bulk Star

achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Time Attack - Frozen Hillside - Slick Star
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete Time Attack on Frozen Hillside with the Slick Star with a time of 3:00:00 or less
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Time Attack - Magma Flows - Turbo Star

achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Time Attack - Checker Knights - Rex Wheelie
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete Time Attack on Checker Knights with the Rex Wheelie with a time of 4:15:00 or less
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Time Attack - Nebula Belt - Swerve Star
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete Time Attack on Nebula Belt with the Swerve Star with a time of 3:00:00 or less
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Of Knights and Kings, Masks and Penguins - I
achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on Fantasy Meadows in a 2 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on Celestial Valley in a 2 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on Sky Sands in a 2 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on Frozen Hillside in a 2 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on Magma Flows in a 2 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on Beanstalk Park in a 2 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Of Knights and Kings, Masks and Penguins - VII
achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on Machine Passage in a 2 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on Checker Knights in a 2 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"

achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: It Pains Me to do This Sire, but I'm Afraid I Must
achievements.description: In Air Ride, retire all 3 CPUs as Meta Knight on any course in a 1 minute time race, CPUs must be King Dedede with a handicap and CPU level of 6 - Damage must be set to "On", Speed Help set to "Strong", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Rubberband Results in Extreme Drifting
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish a lap of Fantasy Meadows without going below 35 mph or 56.5 km/h - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Let Me Fly Among the Stars, and See What Spring is Like
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish a lap during a race of Celestial Valley without being on the ground, rails, or water for more than a total of 4 seconds - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Learning to Deliver Tofu Amidst the Mountain Heat
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish a Free Run lap of Magma Flows with any vehicle besides the Swerve Star without hitting the walls with a time of 1:10:00 or less - If you hit a wall, start the race over
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: This is the End! Kirby! Come Meet Your Doom!!
achievements.description: In Air Ride, win a 3 minute time race with the Wheelie Bike, handicap of 7 or less, on Machine Passage against one CPU playing as Meta Knight, max handicap and CPU level - Damage and Speed Help must be set to "None", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Ready to Race Across the Final Frontier
achievements.description: In Air Ride, race a total of 100 laps to unlock the Nebula Belt course
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Puff of Air is All I Normally Need to Soar
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish a race in 1st place while flying through the air to unlock Winged Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Strikes Fear in Those of the Dark, a Shadow of Destruction
achievements.description: In Air Ride, defeat 10 enemies using the quick spin to unlock Shadow Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Bulk of Your Efforts Relies Upon Annihilation
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish Celestial Valley's Time Attack with a time of 3:20:00 or less to unlock Bulk Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Knights in Checkers? Mate, Check Your Slick Skills
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish 2 laps of Checker Knights with a time of 3:05:00 or less to unlock Slick Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Seems Even Pretty Ice Levels get Formulaic
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish Frozen Hillside's Time Attack with a time of 3:14:00 or less to unlock Formula Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Kawasaki's Delivery Service, Hiring Delivery Drivers
achievements.description: In Air Ride, reach the finish line 3 times outside of Free Run to unlock Wagon Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: This Passage Doesn't Have a Space Branch... Right?
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish a lap of Machine Passage in Free Run with a time of 1:05:00 or less to unlock Rocket Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Better Wear Some Goggles Next Time
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish 2 laps of Sky Sands with a time of 2:05:00 or less to unlock Swerve Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Like a Hawk, Tony and Kirby Ride the Rails
achievements.description: In Air Ride, use all of the volcano rails in Magma Flows and win the race to unlock Turbo Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Sprinting Through the Hallways to Find the Hangar
achievements.description: In Air Ride, reach 4,500 feet or 1,400 metres in a 2 minute race on Machine Passage to unlock Jet Star
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Taste of the Sights, a Reunion With an Old Friend
achievements.description: In Air Ride, start a race on all of the starting tracks to unlock Wheelie Bike
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Star Appears, Become the Ruler of the King Bike
achievements.description: In Air Ride, defeat 100 enemies with exhaled stars to unlock Rex Wheelie
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Making a Sharp Turn of the Standings
achievements.description: In Air Ride, start the final lap of a race in 4th place and win to unlock Wheelie Scooter
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Don't Need no Monster to Clobber That There Kirby!
achievements.description: In Air Ride, defeat 1,000 enemies to unlock King Dedede
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: No Spanish Riff, Sadly
achievements.description: In Air Ride, glide for a total of 30 minutes to unlock Meta Knight
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: One Rider Fits All
achievements.description: In Air Ride, unlock every vehicle and character
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Better Not Fall Asleep During a Sword Fight This Time
achievements.description: In Air Ride, swallow Sword Knight 3 times or more and win the race to unlock Green Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Getting a Bit Purple in the Face From so Many Coasters
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish 2 laps of Beanstalk Park with a time of 2:18:00 or less to unlock Purple Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Its a Rough and Coarse Track That Goes Everywhere
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish a lap of Sky Sands in Free Run with a time of 1:05:00 or less with the Bulk Star to unlock Brown Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Snow Kirby and the Seven Waddles
achievements.description: In Air Ride, finish 2 laps of Celestial Valley with a time of 2:20:00 or less to unlock White Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Does Changing Your Color Affect Your Taste?
achievements.description: In Air Ride, unlock every player color
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Flying to See What Secrets Await You
achievements.description: In Air Ride, glide for a total of 1 hour to unlock the Special machine intros movie
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: An Introduction to Riding the Air
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete any 20 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Novice of Riding the Air
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete any 40 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Proficient at Riding the Air
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete any 60 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Expert of Riding the Air
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete any 80 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Riding Completer of the Air
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete any 100 squares on the checklist to unlock the ending video
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Riding Master of the Air
achievements.description: In Air Ride, complete all 120 squares on the checklist - no purple square unlocks, complete these the intended way to override them
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In Top Ride, win any race with the default lap count with Items set to either "Attack" or "Mystery" against at least 1 CPU - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Destination Better Not be Final

achievements.title: Allergic to Randomly Spawning Items - I
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 7 laps on Grass without using items against at least one level 3 CPU - Items Rule must be set to "Normal" or "Many", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 7 laps on Sand without using items against at least one level 3 CPU - Items Rule must be set to "Normal" or "Many", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Allergic to Randomly Spawning Items - III
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 6 laps on Sky without using items against at least one level 3 CPU - Items Rule must be set to "Normal" or "Many", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Allergic to Randomly Spawning Items - IV
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 6 laps on Fire without using items against at least one level 3 CPU - Items Rule must be set to "Normal" or "Many", and Game Tempo set to "Normal"

achievements.title: Allergic to Randomly Spawning Items - VII

achievements.title: Disabled Overclocking Your Engine - I
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 7 laps on Grass without boosting or getting squished against at least 1 CPU with a handicap of 3 or higher - Game Tempo must be set to "Normal", multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Disabled Overclocking Your Engine - II
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 7 laps on Sand without boosting or getting squished against at least 1 CPU with a handicap of 3 or higher - Game Tempo must be set to "Normal", multiplayer allowed

achievements.title: Disabled Overclocking Your Engine - III
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 6 laps on Sky without boosting or getting squished against at least 1 CPU with a handicap of 3 or higher - Game Tempo must be set to "Normal", multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Disabled Overclocking Your Engine - IV
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 6 laps on Fire without boosting or getting squished against at least 1 CPU with a handicap of 3 or higher - Game Tempo must be set to "Normal", multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Disabled Overclocking Your Engine - V
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 6 laps on Light without boosting or getting squished against at least 1 CPU with a handicap of 3 or higher - Game Tempo must be set to "Normal", multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Disabled Overclocking Your Engine - VI
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 5 laps on Water without boosting or getting squished against at least 1 CPU with a handicap of 3 or higher - Game Tempo must be set to "Normal", multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Disabled Overclocking Your Engine - VII
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 5 laps on Metal without boosting or getting squished against at least 1 CPU, with a handicap of 3 or higher - Game Tempo must be set to "Normal", multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Taking it Slow to Enjoy the Grass
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 7 laps on Grass with a handicap of 3 or lower against 3 CPUs set to level 4 or higher - Speed Help must be set to "None" and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Taking it Slow to Enjoy the Sand
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 7 laps on Sand with a handicap of 3 or lower against 3 CPUs set to level 4 or higher - Speed Help must be set to "None" and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Taking it Slow to Enjoy the Sky
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 6 laps on Sky with a handicap of 3 or lower against 3 CPUs set to level 4 or higher - Speed Help must be set to "None" and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Taking it Slow to Enjoy the Fire
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 6 laps on Fire with a handicap of 3 or lower against 3 CPUs set to level 4 or higher - Speed Help must be set to "None" and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Taking it Slow to Enjoy the Light
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 6 laps on Light with a handicap of 3 or lower against 3 CPUs set to level 4 or higher - Speed Help must be set to "None" and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Taking it Slow to Enjoy the Water
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 5 laps on Water with a handicap of 3 or lower against 3 CPUs set to level 4 or higher - Speed Help must be set to "None" and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Taking it Slow to Enjoy the Metal
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race of at least 5 laps on Metal with a handicap of 3 or lower against 3 CPUs set to level 4 or higher - Speed Help must be set to "None" and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Pink Ghost of Akina Masters Grass
achievements.description: In Top Ride, finish a Free Run lap on Grass with a time of 0:04:50 or less without hitting a wall
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Pink Ghost of Akina Masters Sand
achievements.description: In Top Ride, finish a Free Run lap on Sand with a time of 0:05:00 or less without hitting a wall
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Pink Ghost of Akina Masters Sky
achievements.description: In Top Ride, finish a Free Run lap on Sky with a time of 0:09:00 or less without hitting a wall
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Pink Ghost of Akina Masters Fire
achievements.description: In Top Ride, finish a Free Run lap on Fire with a time of 0:06:50 or less without hitting a wall
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Pink Ghost of Akina Masters Light
achievements.description: In Top Ride, finish a Free Run lap on Light with a time of 0:06:00 or less without hitting a wall
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Illuminating Everything That Turns Against You
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race on every course without using items while the Items Rule isn't set to "None" to unlock the Lantern item
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Must be Chameleo Arm-branded Paint
achievements.description: In Top Ride, collect over 500 items to unlock the Who? Paint item
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Kirby Enlists the Cuckoo Militia
achievements.description: In Top Ride, get 18 different types of items to unlock the Chickie item
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Getting the Hang of the Rides
achievements.description: In Top Ride, cross the goal 20 times or more to unlock Green Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: You've Got a Poyo With Me
achievements.description: In Top Ride, compete in more than 50 multiplayer races to unlock Purple Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: From the Sky, Comes the Fall, Just Ask Pit
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race on Sky against a level 5 CPU to unlock Brown Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Whiter Than My Metallic Dust
achievements.description: In Top Ride, win a race on Metal while being more than 5 seconds faster than 2nd place to unlock White Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Kirby Emotion Color Chart
achievements.description: In Top Ride, unlock every player color
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: An Introduction to Riding the Top
achievements.description: In Top Ride, complete any 20 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Novice of Riding the Top
achievements.description: In Top Ride, complete any 40 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Proficient at Riding the Top
achievements.description: In Top Ride, complete any 60 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Expert of Riding the Top
achievements.description: In Top Ride, complete any 80 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Riding Completer of the Top
achievements.description: In Top Ride, complete any 100 squares on the checklist to unlock the ending video
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Riding Master of the Top
achievements.description: In Top Ride, complete all 120 squares on the checklist - no purple square unlocks, complete these the intended way to override them
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Kirby of the Stars is Now of the City
achievements.description: In City Trial, play through a round of any length and get 1st place against at least 1 CPU - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Rushing Through Your Journey in the City
achievements.description: In City Trial, play through a 3 minute round and get 1st place against at least 1 CPU - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Enjoying the Full Tour of the City's Trials
achievements.description: In City Trial, play through a 7 minute round and get 1st place against at least 1 CPU - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Rental is Only a Rental Until You Claim Ownership
achievements.description: In City Trial, win a round of any length against at least 1 CPU without using any vehicle besides the Compact Star - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: GTA: Poyo City Stories
achievements.description: In City Trial, ride 10 unique vehicles in a single match - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Kirby of the Broken Stars
achievements.description: In City Trial, break the star pole in the first 20 seconds of a match - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Building Up to the Starry Flight
achievements.description: In City Trial, fly from the top floor of the Electric Lounge and destroy the star pole without touching the ground - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Legendary Rush for a Machine
achievements.description: In City Trial, obtain either Hydra or Dragoon in a 3 minute match - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Always Positive, Just Like Kirby
achievements.description: In City Trial, finish a 7 minute match while a single player collects 54 stat patches without collecting any negative stat patches - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Becoming a Gourmet Without Starting a Race
achievements.description: In City Trial, have one player eat 15 food items in a single seven minute match - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Temporary Buffs for Permanent Puffs
achievements.description: In City Trial, have one player collect all three temporary stat buffs and the Candy in a single match in the city - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: He's More Than You Think! He's Got Maximum Pink!
achievements.description: In City Trial, obtain 8 unique Copy Abilities in a single 3 minute match, Copy Chance Wheel does not count - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Percent Above the Food Rush
achievements.description: In a single round of City Trial, have one player obtain 5 hot dogs, sushis, Maxim Tomatoes, or energy drinks - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: These City Hills are Going Silent
achievements.description: In City Trial, collect 20 patches/food/copy patches/etc., during the "Dense Fog" event - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Not Everything Acts That Wacky
achievements.description: In City Trial, find a piece of either Dragoon or Hydra during the "Item Bounce" or "What's In the Box?" events, parts already collected do not count - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Rested and Healed by the House of Light
achievements.description: In City Trial, get healed by the lighthouse for 4 seconds during "The Lighthouse Light Burns" event, resets if you eat food - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Hijacking the Self Flying Machines
achievements.description: In City Trial, board one of the vehicles flying over the city while it is in the air during the "Air Ride Formation" event - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Abducting From the Mysterious Phenomenon
achievements.description: In City Trial, obtain an All patch atop the UFO during its event - Game Tempo set to "Normal" and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Race? I'd Call It a Slaughter Lane
achievements.description: In any of City Trial's Drag Race levels, be the only one to reach the end - Must be against 3 CPUs during a normal City Trial round and Game Tempo set to "Normal"
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Deliver the Ramen Faster Than Delivery Man!
achievements.description: In City Trial's Drag Race 2, reach the end with a time of 0:24:00 or less using the Wagon Star without Copy Abilities - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Learning to Swerve at Your Fastest Speeds
achievements.description: In City Trial's Drag Race 3, reach the end with a time of 0:28:00 or less using the Swerve Star - Must be in Stadium mode, multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Accelerating Your Wheels Beyond Limits
achievements.description: In City Trial's Drag Race 4, reach the end with a time of 0:20:00 or less using the Rex Wheelie - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Even Without Wings, I Can Still Fly... Short Distances
achievements.description: In City Trial's Target Flight, score 150 points or more with a Wheelie vehicle - Game Tempo set to "Normal"  if not done in Stadium mode and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Spinning the Tables Against Everyone - I
achievements.description: In City Trial's Kirby Melee 1, KO over 40 enemies without using Copy Abilities - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Spinning the Tables Against Everyone - II
achievements.description: In City Trial's Kirby Melee 2, KO over 35 enemies without using Copy Abilities - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode and multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Destruction-Derby-in-Style I
achievements.description: In City Trial's Destruction Derby 1, get 1st place without getting KOed against 3 max level CPUs with everyone using one unique vehicle of the following: Winged, Shadow, Rocket, and Formula Star - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Destruction-Derby-in-Style II
achievements.description: In City Trial's Destruction Derby 2, get 1st place without getting KOed against 3 max level CPUs with everyone using one unique vehicle of the following: Winged, Shadow, Rocket, and Formula Star - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Destruction-Derby-in-Style III
achievements.description: In City Trial's Destruction Derby 3, get 1st place without getting KOed against 3 max level CPUs with everyone using one unique vehicle of the following: Winged, Shadow, Rocket, and Formula Star - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Destruction-Derby-in-Style IV
achievements.description: In City Trial's Destruction Derby 4, get 1st place without getting KOed against 3 max level CPUs with everyone using one unique vehicle of the following: Winged, Shadow, Rocket, and Formula Star - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Destruction-Derby-in-Style V
achievements.description: In City Trial's Destruction Derby 5, get 1st place without getting KOed against 3 max level CPUs with everyone using one unique vehicle of the following: Winged, Shadow, Rocket, and Formula Star - Game Tempo set to "Normal" if not done in Stadium mode
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Classic Duel With a Vehicular Twist
achievements.description: In City Trial's VS. King Dedede, defeat King Dedede with only one player, no CPUs
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Burning a Plant Considering the Nearby Threats
achievements.description: In City Trial's Free Run mode, find the hidden white flower and touch it - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Castle's Secret Garden is Missing Soil
achievements.description: In City Trial's Free Run mode, find the hidden pink flower and touch it - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Learning to Climb Without a Narrator
achievements.description: In City Trial's Free Run mode, climb up to the top of the garden in the sky from its base without using a vehicle - multiplayer allowed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Dragging Yourself Into the Heated Air of the Race
achievements.description: In City Trial, finish Drag Race 3 with a time of 0:27:00 or less to unlock Drag Race 4
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Copying What Others Do, But Doing it Better
achievements.description: In City Trial, KO over 75 enemies by yourself in Kirby Melee 1 to unlock Kirby Melee 2
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Burning Desire for Devestation
achievements.description: In City Trial, KO rivals 10 times in Destruction Derby 2 to unlock Destruction Derby 3
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Internal Conflict of the Popstar Nation
achievements.description: In City Trial, KO rivals 5 times in Destruction Derby 3 to unlock Destruction Derby 4
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Building Up Fights Against Truth and Love
achievements.description: In City Trial, KO rivals 10 times in Destruction Derby 4 to unlock Destruction Derby 5
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Entrance of the Puffball Gladiators
achievements.description: In City Trial, play in over 10 Stadium modes to unlock Single Race 9
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Accessing Everything From Our Stadium Facilities
achievements.description: In City Trial, unlock all 24 events in the Stadium list
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: You'll Holler and Hoot, He'll Give Kirby the Boot!
achievements.description: In City Trial, win the VS. King Dedede in under a minute to unlock King Dedede for Free Run
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: So Many Boxes, Yet None Contain a Figurine of Me
achievements.description: In City Trial, break a total of 1,000 boxes to unlock Meta Knight for Free Run
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: This Doesn't Feel Like a Jump, More of a Launch
achievements.description: In City Trial, go higher than 1,000 feet or 300 metres in High Jump to unlock Dragoon Part A
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Kirx Luther is Still at Large
achievements.description: In City Trial, fly through a ring in the sky 5 times to unlock Dragoon Part B
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Air Ride Machines Can't Fly, Just Fall With Style
achievements.description: In City Trial, fly at least 1,300 feet or 400 metres in Air Glider to unlock Dragoon Part C
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Cutting the Skies, Disrupting the Brawls!
achievements.description: In City Trial, unlock all Dragoon parts on the checklist to unlock Dragoon for Free Run
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Farewell Mario, Kirby's Wrecking Crew Arrives!
achievements.description: In City Trial, destroy all the grey buildings to unlock Hydra Part X
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: You're Invited to Kirby's Funeral After This
achievements.description: In City Trial, KO opponents in all Destruction Derby matches 150 times to unlock Hydra Part Y
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: If Only You had Cook to Speed This Up
achievements.description: In City Trial, KO enemies in all Kirby Melee matches over 1,500 times to unlock Hydra Part Z
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The King of Destruction Charges Into the Fray!
achievements.description: In City Trial, unlock all Hydra parts on the checklist to unlock Hydra for Free Run
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Free to Ride When You Run
achievements.description: In City Trial, unlock every vehicle and character for Free Run mode
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Lighting Up Everybody's Lives With What Works
achievements.description: In City Trial, use fireworks to KO rivals 10 times to unlock Green Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Black and Blue From Your Torment
achievements.description: In City Trial, break a CPU's vehicle 5 times in the city to unlock Purple Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Better Call Me Kir-bolt for That Sprint
achievements.description: In City Trial, finish Drag Race 2 with the Winged Star with a time of 0:29:00 or less to unlock Brown Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Take the Blue Box and Ignore, or Take the Red Box and Hope
achievements.description: In City Trial, create both Dragoon and Hydra in a single match to unlock White Kirby
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: More Colors Than a Mirrored Knight Could Create
achievements.description: In City Trial, unlock every player color
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: You're Finally Able to Track What you Have!
achievements.description: In City Trial, pick up a total of 500 items to unlock the pause screen power-ups check
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In City Trial, complete any 20 squares on the checklist

achievements.description: In City Trial, complete any 40 squares on the checklist

achievements.description: In City Trial, complete any 60 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.description: In City Trial, complete any 80 squares on the checklist
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Trial Completer of the City
achievements.description: In City Trial, complete any 100 squares on the checklist to unlock the ending video
